Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Gray Island]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Gray Island is a location north and east of their current position.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — The Gray Island is shrouded in an impenetrable wall of mist year-round.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Gray Island is a location where executions can occur.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — The original Imperial Prison was built off the coast of Aurelia on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Heart might make it back to the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder is to head for the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Gray Island is a location where Naberius wants the group to wait.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Gray Island is the approximate location of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Gray Island has a long stone dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The chapter house is located deeper in Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Gray Island has an aura that can be Read.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The arena is located underneath the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — A bright white dot appeared over the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — The Gray Island contains a forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Gray Island shook under Shuffles' announcement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — The Eternal was waiting a day's trip out from the Gray Island.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — Only Consultants born on the Gray Island have no family name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The Gray Island is a destination Kerian mentioned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 3''' — The dock on Gray Island is made of seamless gray stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Gray Island is a location Shera has ridden to on a Kameira before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The Gray Island is characterized by absolute silence at night.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The high-status prison on Gray Island is hidden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Gray Island is home to two thousand Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Kameira wings its way toward the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Gray Island is a location where Architects are based.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Shera's left shear bears heavier Intent than any other weapon on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Gray Island is a location Meia could have returned to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Meia trained on the Gray Island her whole life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 9''' — Gray Island is located above the chamber where the tower stands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Urzaia Woodsman's wife is locked up on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — The Heart of Nakothi can be restrained at the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — Gray Island is a location that Bastion’s Shadow can reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Gray Island is characterized by untamed wilderness with hidden trails, tunnels, and clearings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — Gray Island contains a labyrinth constructed by Jorin Curse-breaker.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Champions and Great Elders will be present on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Gray Island is a land where an assassin kneels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — The Gray Island is a location where trees exist and monsters have landed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 21''' — Gray Island has a center where a monstrosity looms over the trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Gray Island has a tradition of having everything concealed and difficult to reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — The Gray Island is the location where Shera and Calder Marten are fighting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Gray Island has vaults containing goldmarks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Gray Island is the location where Shera is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Gray Island has an infirmary.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The sun shines brightly on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — Shera has a room on the Gray Island.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Gray Island contains a prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Meia seeks transportation back to the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — A fight occurred on Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Gray Island is currently in a state of mess.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri previously left the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Calder survived a fight on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Cheska and Teach discussed a coordinated assault on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder and Lucan met in the depths of the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri was held in a cell on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — Calder will be leading the attack on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — An attack on the Gray Island is being planned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — The Gray Island is a location where the Guild reaches the dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — The Gray Island has docks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 24''' — The Consultants were scoured from the Gray Island.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — Jorin arrived on the Gray Island a few days prior to Shera knowing him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 2''' — The Gray Island is covered by a shroud of twilight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 3''' — The Gray Island contains endless catacombs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Only Consultants live on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Gray Island has a foundation containing a network of tunnels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Ayana was left in the care of the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — The Gray Island is characterized by layers of mystery, danger, and secrets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — The Gardeners were sent to the Gray Island to do work for the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Gray Island is maintained by the Architects to look natural and pristine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 14''' — The Gray Island is a place where Shera does not worry about burglars and robbers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Jyrine was previously a prisoner on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Shera is sometimes sent to the Gray Island for training.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Shera is tasked with defending the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 20''' — The Gray Island contains the House of the Masons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The Gray Island was filled with traps.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — The group intended to evacuate Gray Island.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Jerri escaped from the Gray Island when the Handmaiden attacked.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Mining is occurring on Gray Island for its treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr demands the return of Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Bastion’s Veil surrounds the Gray Island.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Gray Island has been lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Gray Island contains vaults.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — Shera has spent barely a handful of nights on the Gray Island since killing the Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Gray Island may be under Consultant control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Gray Island contains the Consultant’s Guild headquarters and ancient secrets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Gray Island possesses great defenses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Zhen can find out almost anything that happens on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Gardeners do not hold the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The baby Gardeners were pulled out of the Gray Island prisons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Regents are resting on the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — Gray Island is a location where gardeners do not exist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — Gray Island has a main stone dock and many smaller docks for clandestine departure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Gray Island is a location where the Masons' headquarters are located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Consultants are the only ones on Gray Island who don't have to risk their necks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Jorin chose not to blight the entire Gray Island.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
